raw_jd: Hiring: Forward Deployed Engineer (Frontend Developer) Location: Chennai (Work From Office) Company: Ailaysa Technologies Private Limited Employment Type: Full-Time Experience: 6 Months  1 YearAbout UsAilaysa Technologies is an AI-driven startup building innovative products in Language Technology, AI Solutions, Publishing Technology, and E-Commerce Platforms. We are looking for passionate frontend developers who enjoy building customer-facing products and working directly on real-world business solutions.Position: Forward Deployed Engineer  Frontend DevelopmentAs a Forward Deployed Engineer (FDE), you will work closely with product, engineering, and business teams to build, customize, and deploy frontend solutions for our products and customer projects. This role combines frontend engineering, product implementation, and customer-focused problem solving.Key Responsibilities Develop responsive and scalable web applications using modern frontend technologies. Collaborate with product managers, designers, and backend developers. Build reusable UI components and maintain design consistency. Work directly on customer requirements and product customizations. Integrate frontend applications with APIs and backend services. Troubleshoot, optimize, and improve application performance. Participate in product deployments and implementation activities. Contribute to continuous product improvements and feature enhancements.Required Skills Strong knowledge of HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+)

gemini_verdict.experience_reason: The job explicitly requires a minimum of 6 months of experience, which excludes freshers.
gemini_verdict.profile_reason: The candidate has 0 years of professional experience, failing the strict 6-month minimum requirement.
